outreach_angle: Propose a 90-day Swiss-hosted pilot at CHF 2.5–3.0k/month with PMS integration included. Define success up front: 3–5% uplift in direct room revenue or a clearly attributable conversion lift on the direct channel, evidenced by an ROI dashboard and audit trail linking actions to outcomes. Deliver 1–3 weekly, low-effort actions (rate moves, targeted offers, content tweaks) plus compset alerts. Bring a Swiss reference, confirm CHF invoicing/VAT and data residency, and involve Finance in the kickoff. Offer monthly opt-out after pilot, white-glove onboarding, and a clear procurement pack (DPA, SLA, security). Time the start for a shoulder period to reduce operational strain.
disagreements: price_band: GM=2000_3000 vs CM=1000_2000 | deal_killer: GM="No auditable proof of impact (≥3–5% direct revenue uplift or equivalent conversion lift) within the agreed pilot window or failed PMS integration." vs CM="No reliable PMS/booking-engine integration or no measurable commercial uplift within 60–90 days."
